scripts.build: echo "Python service — no JS build step"
scripts.lint: bash scripts/with-venv.sh ruff check services/ utils/ middleware/ db/ main.py config.py || echo 'Skipping lint — run dev once to set up venv'
scripts.type-check: bash scripts/with-venv.sh mypy services/ utils/ middleware/ db/ main.py config.py || echo 'Skipping type-check — run dev once to set up venv'
scripts.test: bash scripts/with-venv.sh pytest tests/ -v || echo 'Skipping tests — run dev once to set up venv'
